titleStmt.title: SII 30.227: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 227. (A.R. No. 578 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-at the entrance into the mukha-maṇḍapa: left side Jaṭ. Kulasēkara-Pāṇḍya: year 13+1, Karkaṭaka, 27, Rēvati, Friday: 1266 A.D.

summary.p: It records the gift of one āṉai-achchu for a lamp to the temple of Piṇakkaṟukku Nāyanār at Malaiyaḍikkuṟichchi, a southern hamlet of Śri Parāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Āri-nāḍu by Kēsava Nārāyaṇaṉ, a native of Māṅkōṭṭuch-chēri in Malai-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ cikulacekara tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatiṉ Etirā
māṇṭu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu Irupatteḻu tiyatiyum Irevatiyum peṟṟa veḷḷikkiḻamaināḷ Ārināṭṭu brahmadeyam ciparā
n=takaccatuppeti maṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai malaiyaṭikkuṟicci Uṭaiyār piṇakkaṟukku nāyaṉāṟku malaimaṇṭalattu māṅ
koṭṭucceri kecavanārāyaṇaṉ vacca cantiyātipam Oṉṟukku Akanāḻikai potuvil civabrāhmaṇar potuvāka cantirātittavar celut
tuvom Āka kaikkoṇṭa Āṉai Accu Oṉṟu §
Digital edition of SII 30.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
